testcase.name: test_default_dispatch_uses_portable_when_available[bf16]

failure.message:
AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal!
Mismatched elements: 5 / 16 (31.2%) Greatest absolute difference: 2.384185791015625e-07 at index (0, 1) Greatest relative difference: 6.985462874808945e-08 at index (4, 0)

testcase.failure: tests/v1/cpu_partial_attention/test_portable_cross_check.py:308: in test_default_dispatch_uses_portable_when_available torch.testing.assert_close(LSE_default, LSE_force, atol=0, rtol=0) E AssertionError: Tensor-likes are not equal! E E Mismatched elements: 5 / 16 (31.2%) E Greatest absolute difference: 2.384185791015625e-07 at index (0, 1) E Greatest relative difference: 6.985462874808945e-08 at index (4, 0)

testcase.name: test_cpu_offloading[FLASH_ATTN-48]

failure.message:
OSError: You are trying to access a gated repo. Make sure to have access to it at https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct. 403 Client Error. (Request ID: Root=1-69f01c66-7aeda69541ac42a81ec689bc;fa199ac8-b5d1-4fc7-8d63-7fa80c4cd1b0)
Cannot access gated repo for url https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct/resolve/main/config.json. Access to model meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct is restricted and you are not in the authorized list. Visit https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct to ask for access.

testcase.failure:
../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/utils/_http.py:402: in hf_raise_for_status response.raise_for_status() ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/requests/models.py:1026: in raise_for_status raise HTTPError(http_error_msg, response=self) E requests.exceptions.HTTPError: 403 Client Error: Forbidden for url: https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct/resolve/main/config.json
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/transformers/utils/hub.py:479: in cached_files hf_hub_download( ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/utils/_validators.py:114: in _inner_fn return fn(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/file_download.py:1007: in hf_hub_download return _hf_hub_download_to_cache_dir( ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/file_download.py:1114: in _hf_hub_download_to_cache_dir _raise_on_head_call_error(head_call_error, force_download, local_files_only) ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/file_download.py:1655: in _raise_on_head_call_error raise head_call_error ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/file_download.py:1543: in _get_metadata_or_catch_error metadata = get_hf_file_metadata( ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/utils/_validators.py:114: in _inner_fn return fn(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/file_download.py:1460: in get_hf_file_metadata r = _request_wrapper( ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/file_download.py:283: in _request_wrapper response = _request_wrapper( ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/file_download.py:307: in _request_wrapper hf_raise_for_status(response) ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/utils/_http.py:419: in hf_raise_for_status raise _format(GatedRepoError, message, response) from e E huggingface_hub.errors.GatedRepoError: 403 Client Error. (Request ID: Root=1-69f01c66-7aeda69541ac42a81ec689bc;fa199ac8-b5d1-4fc7-8d63-7fa80c4cd1b0) E E Cannot access gated repo for url https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct/resolve/main/config.json. The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/v1/kv_offload/test_cpu_offloading.py:219: in test_cpu_offloading llm = LLM( vllm/entrypoints/llm.py:381: in __init__ self.llm_engine = LLMEngine.from_engine_args( vllm/v1/engine/llm_engine.py:163: in from_engine_args vllm_config = engine_args.create_engine_config(usage_context) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ vllm/engine/arg_utils.py:1590: in create_engine_config maybe_override_with_speculators( vllm/transformers_utils/config.py:585: in maybe_override_with_speculators config_dict, _ = PretrainedConfig.get_config_dict( ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/transformers/configuration_utils.py:662: in get_config_dict config_dict, kwargs = cls._get_config_dict(pretrained_model_name_or_path, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/transformers/configuration_utils.py:721: in _get_config_dict resolved_config_file = cached_file( ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/transformers/utils/hub.py:322: in cached_file file = cached_files(path_or_repo_id=path_or_repo_id, filenames=[filename], **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../vllm_dev_prj/lib/python3.12/site-packages/transformers/utils/hub.py:543: in cached_files raise OSError( E OSError: You are trying to access a gated repo.
